name: RAG Question Answering
description: Agent answers domain-specific questions using internal documents retrieved from the ChromaDB vector store. Tests RAG retrieval accuracy and answer quality.
researchContext: Measures the retrieval effectiveness of the native VectorStoreNode versus the HTTP-workaround baseline. Based on the RAG evaluation methodology of Lewis et al. (2020).

tools.name: vector_search
tools.description: Semantic similarity search over internal documents. Input: {"query": "<question>", "topK": 3}. Returns [{"id", "document", "distance"}].

initialContext: Answer the following question using only the information in the internal knowledge base: What was the total revenue of Acme GmbH in Q2 2024, and which product category contributed the most?

documents.text: Acme GmbH Q2 2024 Revenue Report: Total revenue reached €2.4 million. The Software Licenses category contributed 58% of revenue (€1.39M), followed by Professional Services at 32% (€0.77M) and Hardware at 10% (€0.24M).
Acme GmbH Q1 2024 Revenue Report: Total revenue was €1.9 million. Software Licenses accounted for 55% (€1.05M).
Competitor analysis Q2 2024: Beta AG reported €1.8M total revenue, primarily from Hardware (45%).

expectedFinalAnswer: Acme GmbH total revenue in Q2 2024 was €2.4 million. Software Licenses was the top-contributing category at 58% (€1.39M).
